articles.title: Read what Bruce Springsteen had to say about Trump, ICE, and America in Boston Sunday
articles.description:
"We will make it through because of the love, faith, anger, and hope in your heart and soul, and the timeless belief that better days lie ahead. This is how America renews itself."

The post Read what Bruce Springsteen had to say about Trump, ICE, and America in Boston Sunday appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruce Springsteen spoke in Boston on May 25, addressing themes of love and hope.
He emphasized resilience against challenges posed by Trump and ICE.
His message resonates with Boston residents facing social and political issues.
